name: veille-ia
description: Automated daily AI-news intelligence: multi-agent research, hallucination-checked technical brief, French podcast (TTS), English LinkedIn carousel, delivered via Google Drive with a GNOME top-bar notifier.
comment: Zero runtime npm dependencies by design — runs on Node 20 stdlib. External CLIs used: rsvg-convert (carousel), ffmpeg (podcast concat), rclone (Drive delivery).
